channel.title: SkyLiving Tambaram - Premium Luxury Apartments on Property Scouts - Premium Real Estate in Chennai
channel.description: Recent content in SkyLiving Tambaram - Premium Luxury Apartments on Property Scouts - Premium Real Estate in Chennai

item.title: Affordable Luxury - SkyLiving Pricing & Payment Plans
item.description: Affordable Luxury: Own Your Dream Home Premium Living Doesn’t Have to Be Expensive SkyLiving offers transparent pricing with flexible payment plans. Own a luxury apartment starting from ₹41K/month EMI—less than many premium rentals in Chennai. Pricing: Crystal Clear, No Hidden Costs 2BHK Apartment Base Price: ₹62L - ₹67L (varies by floor, view, corner unit) Price Breakdown (₹62L Example): Basic property: ₹62L (inclusive) Registration & legal: Buyer covers (typical ₹1-1.5L) Possession charges: None (included in price) Maintenance deposit: ₹5K/month setup reserve Total cost to own: ₹63-64L What’s Included:

item.title: Investment Opportunity - SkyLiving Tambaram
item.description: Smart Investment: SkyLiving Tambaram Achieve 11-15% Annualized Returns SkyLiving is designed for serious investors seeking high rental yield, strong appreciation potential, and tax-optimized wealth building in one of Chennai’s fastest-growing micro-markets. Expected Investment Returns Rental Yield: 9-12% p.a. 2BHK Investment Purchase: ₹62L - ₹67L Monthly Rental: ₹50K - ₹60K Annual: ₹6L - ₹7.2L Gross Yield: 9-12% 3BHK Investment Purchase: ₹85L - ₹1Cr Monthly Rental: ₹65K - ₹80K Annual: ₹7.8L - ₹9.

item.title: NRI Investment Opportunity - SkyLiving Tambaram
item.description: SkyLiving for NRI Investors Invest in India’s Real Estate Without Visiting. Earn in Multiple Currencies. SkyLiving is fully FPI-compliant and designed for NRI investors. Buy, manage, and earn rental income entirely remotely. Zero hassle. Maximum returns. Why NRIs Choose SkyLiving FPI-Compliant Property What FPI Means: Foreign Portfolio Investment rules allow NRIs to own Indian residential property Completely legal, transparent, tax-compliant No government approval needed (unlike commercial property) Can own any number of residential units Your Rights as NRI Owner: ✅ Full ownership rights (same as resident Indian)

item.title: Perfect Home for Growing Families - SkyLiving Tambaram
item.description: Homes for Happy Families Where Your Family Can Thrive SkyLiving is designed for families who want premium living without compromising on safety, education, and community. A gated haven with world-class amenities and everything families need to flourish. Why Families Choose SkyLiving Top-Tier Education Nearby Best Schools in 5-10 km radius: Saveetha School of Engineering (International Curriculum) Narayana Institute (CBSE, Excellence in Sciences) ACS Avadi (American Curriculum, 24/7 Security) DAV Public School (ICSE, Sports Excellence) Campus visits organized - We can arrange school visits before you decide.

item.title: Perfect Location - SkyLiving Tambaram
item.description: Location Mastery: Live Where You Work Commute ≤ 20 minutes. Connectivity ✓ Everywhere. The future is here. Tambaram is Chennai’s emerging tech hub. SkyLiving is positioned at the heart of this transformation—close to work, close to city, close to life. The Connectivity Advantage IT Parks: Your Workplace is Next Door DLF Cybercity (20 mins): Home to 10,000+ IT professionals Cognizant Technology Solutions (major office) TCS (multiple departments) Infosys (development center) HCL Technologies presence Google office (expanding) Your Commute Math:

item.title: Ultra-Luxury Living - SkyLiving Tambaram
item.description: SkyLiving: Pinnacle of Urban Luxury Exclusivity Redefined. Privacy Maximized. Prestige Assured. SkyLiving is not for everyone. It’s for those who refuse to settle. Low-density design, ultra-premium finishes, and world-class services create a sanctuary for those who appreciate the finer things. The Exclusivity Factor Only 2 Units Per Floor Side What This Means: Your privacy is sacred — maximum 4 units per floor Shared elevators only with one neighbor per floor Your own exclusive view and natural light No crowded corridors or noise from multiple units Intimate community of 175 families across 2 blocks Compare to Competitors:
